title: RsaKey::raw_op calls wolfhsm_rsa_sign for all operations
description: rsa.rs: RsaKey::raw_op uses wolfhsm_rsa_sign as the underlying FFI call for all four RsaRawOp variants including PublicDecrypt and PrivateDecrypt. A contributor reading this will wonder why a sign function is called for decrypt/verify operations and may assume it is a bug. Add a comment on the wolfhsm_rsa_sign call explaining that the wolfHSM shim uses a single entry point for all raw RSA modular exponentiation directions, and that the op discriminant selects the direction.
